name: ai-auto-dashboard-builder
description: AI-powered Auto-Dashboard Builder - Turn plain English into analytics dashboards from multiple data sources

scripts.db:reset: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.setup: npm install && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
